description: Bundled baseline ONNX weights shipped with the wheel. Self-learning loop treats these as gen 0; trained candidates promote on top of them. Sha256 is computed at package build time and verified at boot.

intent.notes: MiniLM-L12 fine-tuned on hand-mapped public NLU corpora plus synthetic gateway prompts. macro-F1=0.897, ECE=0.061.

safety.notes: Backed by a deterministic rule-based fallback (rule_fallbacks/safety.py) so the observer signal is non-zero even before local samples accumulate.

schema_mapper.notes: Maps freeform queries to canonical schema fields.

cold_start.policy: When a model has provenance=baseline AND predictions_7d < samples_until_graduation, the dashboard renders a 'cold start' state. ONNX verdicts still log to the verdict buffer (observer-only; never enforce); declarative policies and rule fallbacks remain authoritative.
